text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, July 26. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That is a common bottleneck. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. First United Mortgage offered 5.5% with zero points. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. A rate of 5.5% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. He is doing so well. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
